reviews.review_description: no players, buggy, when i turn on urp its super laggy, celling too high, model hands weird, and bad lighting. There is still some things i didnt mention but yeah pretty bad, wouldn't recommend!

developer_response.body: This game is old and discontinued! Sorry if you dont like it!

reviews.review_description: mostly everything is not too vibrant and is just the right style. The designs are awesome, (most) jump scares are really well made, and the layout is something I can remember! I hope this game gets lots of fame, and starts to grow. Cause this games deserves it!!
This game is a little bugs but is still good it has cosmetics its has events and it has a small but great community and this game I hope will grow and become a popular game in the future.
